# workshops.txt — the production repos your factory manages besides your office
#
# A "workshop" is any repo your team builds and maintains that ISN'T your
# office: a website, an app, a client project. Listing it here is what turns
# it on — the god-view audit will start reporting its health, and the
# workshop-edit workflow will accept it as a target. A workshop not listed
# here is invisible to both.
#
# One repo per line, as owner/repo. Lines starting with # are comments.
# This file is yours: the factory template never overwrites it.
#
# Adding a workshop is a three-step, gated setup (a narrow write key, an
# Actions secret, and one line in workshop-edit.yml) — the full click-by-click
# is in guides/WORKSHOPS.md. Nothing here grants any access on its own.
#
# Example (uncomment and replace with your real repos):
# acme/my-site
# acme/my-app
